h1.visual_description: Large, blue, bold, sans-serif font used for primary page titles.

h2.visual_description: Bold, black, sans-serif font, flush left, used for main section headings in the table of contents.

h3.visual_description: Bold, black, sans-serif font, indented from the left margin, used for sub-section headings in the table of contents.
h3.example_text: How molecules move in a liquid

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Page header containing institution name (orange) and course code (red), separated from body by a red horizontal rule.
Table of contents leader dots connecting a heading to its corresponding page number.

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Header text above the red line and centered numeric page numbers at the bottom margin.
